title: Clue Scroll HUD for Vulengate
description: 📜 A lightweight HUD mod for the Vulengate Minecraft server that displays clue scroll objectives and progress.
body:
# Overview **Clue Scroll HUD** is a lightweight client-side mod for the [**Vulengate**](https://www.vulengate.com/) Minecraft server that displays your clue scroll objectives and progress directly on the in-game HUD. No more opening your inventory and hovering over items to check your tasks!

# Features - 📜 Automatically detects clue scrolls in your inventory. - 🔍 Displays your scroll tiers, objectives, and progress directly on the HUD. - ✅ Tracks task progress in real-time and highlights completed clues. - ⏰ Shows time remaining before scrolls expire. # Dependencies This mod has the following hard dependencies: - [Fabric Loader & API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) This mod also has an optional dependency on the [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) mod.
Although Mod Menu is not required, it will make configuring this mod much easier. # Usage 1. Download and install the mod and its dependencies. 2. Join the Vulengate server and obtain a clue scroll in-game. 3. The mod will automatically detect clue scrolls in your inventory and display information about them on-screen. 4. Customise HUD appearance and behaviour in the mod’s config screen (via ModMenu, if installed as suggested). **Note**: This mod is designed specifically for use on the Vulengate Minecraft server. When not playing on this server, it provides no additional functionality. For further details, including bug reports, feature requests, and answers to frequently asked questions, please visit the mod's [GitHub repository](https://github.com/Ueva/vg-ClueScrollHUD). # Copyright This mod is an unofficial client-side mod developed for the [**Vulengate**](https://www.vulengate.com/) Minecraft server. No copyrighted or otherwise restricted resources have been used in the development of this mod. The "_Vulengate_" name and all associated trademarks are reserved by their respective owners. Vulengate staff have given [their consent](https://github.com/Ueva/vg-ClueScrollHUD/blob/master/assets/vg-consent.png) for the development, distribution, and use of this mod. This mod is licensed under the [**MIT License**](https://github.com/Ueva/vg-ClueScrollHUD/blob/master/LICENSE).
